◎简　　介  

　　Scott and Heather, high school sweethearts and the most popular teens in town, vowed to stay a couple while at college.  But when they return home over Thanksgiving break, Heather dumps Scott, sending the usually cheery hometown hero into a tailspin.  Amidst his misery, Scott starts an unlikely fling with Tori, a former nerd, who's blossomed since leaving for college.  Meanwhil...
